basic_details.job_title: Swami Atmanand Excellent English Medium Schools – Teacher, Assistant Teacher and More – 23 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Atmanand Utkrisht (English Medium) School Management Committee, Balrampur-Ramanujganj, Chhattisgarh
basic_details.short_information: Swami Atmanand Utkrisht English Medium Schools Recruitment 2026: 23 teaching vacancies announced for Lecturer, Teacher, PET and Assistant Teacher posts. Apply offline through Registered Post from 25 May to 09 June 2026 at balrampur.gov.in

age_limit.age_details: Candidates must have studied in English Medium from Class 6th onwards.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-wise as mentioned in vacancy table (Graduation/Post Graduation with B.Ed compulsory for most posts). Entire education must be in English Medium (except Hindi & Sanskrit posts).

selection_process: Merit based on Academic Marks (No Written Exam)
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit applications only through Registered Post / Speed Post . Applications should reach the office on or before 09-06-2026 (5:30 PM).
seo_tags: Swami Atmanand Schools Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 23 Teacher, Assistant Teacher and More Posts
